name: Emoji Builder
author: Poki
description: Create your own emojis in Emoji Builder! Use different parts of your favorite emojis to make unique combinations. Once you've created four different ones, you can show off your creations in a reel! There's countless different combinations to make. Let's get creative! How to play Emoji Builder? Use the mouse or tap to put your emoji together! Who created Emoji Builder? Emoji Builder was created by pgs1000. Play their other games on Poki: Emoji Dropper ! How can I play Emoji Builder for free? You can play Emoji Builder for free on Poki. Can I play Emoji Builder on mobile devices and desktop? Emoji Builder can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
